steps.title: This protocol performs a custom sample...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs a custom sample pooling from a source PCR plate to a 1.5, 2, or 5ml Eppendorf tube. Sample locations and volumes are specified via .csv file in the following format, including the header line (empty lines ignored): ``` source plate well,volume sample (µl) A1, 28 C4, 12 ``` The proper pipette for a given volume is automatically calculated. Tips are changed for each transfer. You can download an example .csv to edit directly [here](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/pooling/ex.csv). ---

steps.title: Input the normalization
steps.instruction: Input the normalization .csv file, and the respective mount sides for your P10 and P50 GEN1 single-channel pipettes.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
